features.featureTitle: Update the Admin page to include a Replicate API Key configuration section. Display the current key status (configured / not configured) via hasReplicateApiKey, provide a password-type text input and a Save button that calls setReplicateApiKey, and show a success or error toast on completion. If the key is not configured, display a prominent warning banner on the Admin page.

Implement client-side exponential backoff retry logic in the GenerationTab component. After a generation error, display a 'Retry' button that re-submits the same prompt up to 3 times with delays of 2s, 4s, and 8s between attempts. Show the current attempt number (e.g., 'Retrying… attempt 2/3') during retries. Use a stable idempotency key (derived from prompt + timestamp) stored in component state so the same request is not double-processed.

Improve the generation error UX on the GenerationTab component. When a typed error variant is returned from the backend (#ApiKeyMissing, #ApiError, #Timeout, #ParseError), display a specific, human-readable error message corresponding to the error type rather than a generic 'Generation error'. Map each variant to a distinct user-facing string (e.g., 'Service not configured — contact admin', 'Provider error — please retry', 'Request timed out — please retry', 'Unexpected response — please retry').
